mnemonics.title: CARE
mnemonics.content: C - Class, A - Allocate memory, R - Reference variable, E - Execute constructor

mnemonics.title: Declare Instantiated Objects
mnemonics.content: DIO - Declare, Instantiate, Operate on objects

mnemonics.title: Object Creation
mnemonics.content: NEW CAR - New keyword, Class name, Allocate memory, Reference variable
